proof_sketch: For the fixed shape [16,256,256], the inner_size equals 65536 (dim=0), 256 (dim=1), or 1 (dim=2). The kernel launches ceil(inner_size/256) blocks in y, each with 256 threads. For inner_size=256 or 65536, the maximum inner_idx is inner_size-1, so inner_idx==inner_size never occurs. Only when inner_size=1 (dim=2) does inner_idx==1 become reachable. The tested configuration likely uses dim=1 (common default), making the mutated condition unreachable.
